seoTitle: WJCC Schools Calendar 2025-2026: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Williamsburg-James City County Schools 2025-2026 calendar with Aug 25 first day, Jun 10 last day, holidays, winter break, spring break, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: Williamsburg-James City County Public Schools starts the 2025-2026 school year on August 25, 2025. Winter Break runs December 22-January 3, Spring Break runs April 6-10, and the last day of school is June 10, 2026. The calendar also lists family conferences, student holidays, marking period starts, report cards, early releases, and make-up day notes.

calendarFaqs.q: When does WJCC start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school is Monday, August 25, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When is WJCC Spring Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, April 6 through Friday, April 10, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for WJCC in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Wednesday, June 10, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When are WJCC early release days near the end of 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Grades 9-12 have early release on June 5 and June 8, and all Pre-K-12 students have early release on June 9 and June 10.

yearNumbers.label: First Day
yearNumbers.detail: The first day of school is August 25, 2025.

yearNumbers.label: Last Day
yearNumbers.detail: The last day of school is June 10, 2026.
